raw_title: Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement
title_en: Affording Fragmented Audiences: Multi-Platform Deliberation within the Five Star Movement
title_zh: 应对碎片化受众：五星运动内部的多平台审议
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了意大利五星运动如何利用多个数字平台与分散的受众进行沟通和审议。它关注政治团体如何适应现代媒体环境，其中人们通过不同渠道获取信息。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how Italy's Five Star Movement uses multiple digital platforms to communicate and deliberate with fragmented audiences. It focuses on how political groups adapt to modern media environments where people get information through different channels.
research_direction_zh: 数字时代政治传播与审议研究，关注多平台策略对政治参与和民主进程的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on political communication and deliberation in the digital age, focusing on how multi-platform strategies affect political participation and democratic processes.
